duration_ms.description: Elapsed time in milliseconds. Use null only for blocked or otherwise non-executed trace rows where no real run occurred. Real executions should record a numeric value.

turns.description: Conversation turn count. Use null only for blocked or otherwise non-executed trace rows where no real run occurred. Real executions should record a numeric value.

tool_calls.description: Total tool calls observed for the run. Use null only for blocked or otherwise non-executed trace rows where no real run occurred. Real executions should record a numeric value.

files_read.description: Total files read during the run. Use null only for blocked or otherwise non-executed trace rows where no real run occurred. Real executions should record a numeric value.

treatment_usage_class.description: Treatment-only classification for pi-lsp usage in the run: direct symbol/definition/reference adoption, rank-context-only usage, or treatment loaded but bypassed.

treatment_direct_adoption_calls.description: Count of direct pi-lsp adoption calls (`pi_lsp_get_symbol`, `pi_lsp_find_definition`, `pi_lsp_find_references`) in treatment runs.

treatment_context_calls.description: Count of treatment-context-only calls (`pi_lsp_rank_context`) in treatment runs.

notes.description: Freeform benchmark notes. Pi runtime artifacts may expose machine-readable usage in extension-owned files such as .pi/suggester/sessions/*/usage.json (session aggregates like inputTokens/outputTokens/costTotal) and .pi/suggester/logs/events.ndjson (turn-level inputTokens/outputTokens/cost), but if those artifacts cannot be confidently mapped to the exact benchmark run, record input_tokens/output_tokens/cost as null and note the missing run-level linkage while still capturing duration/turns/tool_calls/files_read/quality. For blocked or non-executed trace rows, record duration_ms/turns/tool_calls/files_read as null and explain why the run did not occur.
